title: Contact Will Forster MP - Will Forster MP
meta_description: Will Forster is the Liberal Democrat Member of Parliament for Woking.
text_excerpt: Contact Will Forster MP - Will Forster MP Skip to main content Will Forster MP About Will Contact Will Will's Campaigns Volunteer News Woking Lib Dems Donate Join Donate Join Will's Campaigns Hilton & Sir Robert McAlpine International Affairs Housing & Welfare Vulnerable Children Council Finance Cost of living Healthcare, Social Care & the NHS Trains News Article Contact Will As your local Liberal Democrat MP for Woking, I want to hear what matters to you. Please get in touch to let me know your priorities for our area and any issues you need help with. By phone: 01483 66 29 35 By email : will.forster.mp@parliament.uk Constituency Office: Will Forster MP, One Crown Square, Church Street East, Woking, GU21 6HR Parliamentary Office : Will Forster MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA On social media: Facebook X/Twitter Bluesky Instagram Sign up for email updates Get the latest news from Will Forster MP and the local Lib Dem team Oops! Form successfully submitted First Name * Last Name * Email Address * You can opt-out at any time Postcode * Sign up The Liberal Democrats may use the information you provide, including your political opinions, to further our objectives and share it with our elected representatives. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy: libdems.org.uk/privacy . You can exercise your rights and withdraw your consent to future communications by contacting us: data.protection@libdems.org.uk or: DPO, Lib Dems, 66 Buckingham Gate, London, SW1E 6AU. The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU.
